'''11-17 mining droids''' were independent [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]]. They were made by [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]] and [[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines/Legends|Roche]]. 11-17s were equipped with a large [[plasma jet]], a telescoping circular saw and a blow torch. To protect it against rockslides, the 11-17 had [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating. Such [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were used on [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]].<ref name="EGD" />

They had well-developed personality, and would have strong loyalty to their owners. The droids were known to rescue miners trapped in cave-ins. They would also put off recharging and work extra hours when a project was facing a deadline.<ref name="A&E" />

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1994) 6|''Droids'' (1994) 6]] {{1st}}
*''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'' {{Mo}}
